title: Pesto Green Beans & Broccoli
summary: These pesto green beans and broc are perfect for meal prep. Combine them with your choice of protein, carb and topping to create your perfect meal-prep dish.

method.description: Bring a pot of salted water to a rolling boil. Drop in the beans and broccoli for 3-4 mins or until just tender, still with a little bite. Shock in icy cold water and then dry.
Add the pesto to a large mixing bowl and grate in the Parmesan. Add the zest and juice of the lemon and a couple of glugs of olive oil. Season with salt and pepper and mix to a loose pesto dressing.
Drop the cooked beans and broccoli into the bowl with the dressing. Scatter over the toasted almonds and toss together.
If batch cooking for the week, transfer to containers and store in the fridge until ready to eat.

chefs.name: Ben Lippett
chefs.summary: Ben Lippett (@dinnerbyben) is a cook, food writer, recipe developer, and co-founder of Dr Sting's Hot Honey. Ben spent years working at a spate of restaurants in the UK and Australia – including a brief but rewarding stint at a butcher's – before making the leap to food media.
